author: Ash
review: I am BLOWN away by how organized, professional and sweet this Management is! Dana was our Manager and she was so accommodating and kind! Dionne and Chris were just as sweet!

author: michelle takasugi
review: My husband and I worked with Dana to find and secure a place in Jefferson County. She was extremely helpful, easy to communicate with, and quick to get the process handled. Since we are out of state, we had to do everything online, through

author: Will Barnwell
review: So far so good. The only people that got back to us in a timely manner while looking for housing in Jefferson County. Was able to coordinate a rental almost entirely online after an initial meeting with clear communication at every step.

author: Shalae Lundgren
review: Tami is awesome!!! She is very knowledgeable & was able to help us find a beautiful home at a great price for our family. We love Chris too! Will definitely keep renting from them.

author: Kris Springer
review: We have been renting from the landowner through Townsend Bay Property Management. TBPM have been helpful when we have had issues and quite up front about timing for things within their control. Tami has been wonderful to work with.

author: Allan Duane
review: This was a terrible experience renting from them. They treated me poorly and then took money from me in the end. Avoid them. I would of put zero stars but I had to put 1 to post this.

author: Stephanie Moran
review: Tammy & the staff are knowledgeable, efficient, friendly know their stuff
